title: MNE-somato-data-bids (anonymized)
description: This dataset contains somatosensory MEG recordings converted to BIDS format, including raw MEG data, anatomical MRI scans, and FreeSurfer-derived structural derivatives. The dataset includes forward models and boundary element models computed using MNE-BIDS, providing a complete neuroimaging resource for studying somatosensory processing and demonstrating MEG-MRI integration workflows.
methods_description: MEG data were acquired and subsequently converted to BIDS format using MNE-BIDS. Anatomical T1-weighted MRI images were processed using FreeSurfer's recon-all pipeline with default parameters. Additional FreeSurfer processing included scalp surface generation (mne make_scalp_surfaces) and watershed-based boundary element model computation (mne watershed_bem). Forward models were computed from source space definitions, head-MRI transformation matrices, and conductor models.
